column1: Table 12: Use of Federal Rental Assistance
HERA = Housing and Economic Recovery Act. LIHTC = Low-Income Housing Tax Credit. PIS = LIHTC Properties Placed in Service database.
Amt of FRA NR = Amount of Federal Rental Assistance Not Reported
1 Source of Federal Rental Assistance includes tenants with a reported positive amount of Total Rental Assistance, even if reported Federal Rental Assistance is $0.
2 Percent of Units with Reported Amount of Federal Rental Assistance is percent of all occupied all units.
3 Information for California was not reported due to migration to a new compliance reporting system.
